title: LIVE NOW! Hybrid construction as a solution to mitigate climate and housing crises [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The construction sector plays a central role in the EU’s climate objectives. Buildings account for a significant share of Europe’s energy consumption and greenhouse gas emissions, while the embodied carbon of construction materials is gaining increasing attention in the EU. As Europe advances initiatives such as the European Affordable Housing Plan and the Circular Economy […]
